name: melm_vs_rag_resource_efficiency
description: Local CPU query-time probe comparing the current pure-Python event-memory retriever with plain bag-of-words RAG over the same event list.

result.event_memory_resource_conclusion: not currently way more CPU/RAM efficient than RAG
result.event_memory_validation_conclusion: more evidence/context efficient on current validation tasks

caveats: This is not an embedded benchmark.
A Pi-class resource win requires indexed event/state storage or a Rust/C sidecar.
